# CNX Cigars

CNX Cigars is a premium cigar lounge and licensed tobacco distributor located in Chiang Mai, Northern Thailand. Founded by Amir Nadimi with thirty years of expertise in Cuban and premium New World cigars.

## Location

2nd Floor, 45 Nimmana Haeminda Rd Lane 11, Chiang Mai 50200, Thailand
Open daily 12pm to midnight. Walk-ins welcome.

## What We Offer

- Premium cigar lounge with climate-controlled humidor (68-70% humidity, cool and even temperature)
- Curated selection of Cuban marques: Cohiba, Montecristo, Romeo y Julieta, Partagas, Bolivar, Hoyo de Monterrey, H.Upmann, Trinidad, Punch
- New World cigars available by request
- Cigar accessories: humidors, cutters, lighters, travel cases, ashtrays, humidity care
- Private VIP room for 4-6 guests (bookable)
- Open lounge for 30+ guests
- Full bar: single malt whiskies, premium spirits, wine, champagne, cocktails
- B2B consulting for hotels, restaurants, and hospitality venues (programme design, humidor setup, staff training)
- Private tastings and guided flavour-mapping sessions

## Pricing

Entry-level cigars from 200 THB. Premium and rare Cuban marques to 1,500 THB and above.
No membership required. Walk-ins welcome.

## Contact

WhatsApp: +66 622 769 937
